specific_question: How much money was the Elexion Automotive Sales Operations team able to save by renegotiating the CRM software license fees?
answer: Through a series of contract renegotiation meetings in June 2024, the Elexion Automotive Sales Operations team was able to lower the monthly CRM license fee by $5,000.
dr_question: If Elexion Automotive shifts from dealership franchising to a direct-to-customer sales model, how could it capture the benefits of the transition to drive sales and higher margins in 2027?
